    You are the first liquidity provider.

    The ratio of tokens you add will set the price of this pool.

    %

    Transaction may be frontrun

    By adding liquidity you'll earn 0.1% of all trades on this pair proportional to your share of the pool. Fees are added to the pool, accrue in real time and can be claimed by withdrawing your liquidity.
